'''Kiribi''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. Its [[Galactic coordinates/Legends|galactic coordinates]] were 099, 099, 011. Although it was located 5000 light-years away from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], because Kiribi's coordinates were positive and began with zero, it was part of the [[Imperial Center Oversector]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]].<ref name="CatCW" />
